shared_patterns.pattern: concise problem description followed by a specific detail or request for assistance
use of informal language and abbreviations (e.g., 'it's', 'tried reinstall')
direct mention of technical issues (e.g., '502', 'android 14')
common structure of stating the issue first, followed by additional context or attempts to resolve
i am unable to
despite having
i tried
but it still doesn't work
i followed all the instructions carefully
keeps shutting off unexpectedly
repeated structure of stating a problem followed by additional context or details
use of personal anecdotes or additional information that diverges from the main issue
similar sentence length and complexity across samples
direct complaints about service or products
informal language and abbreviations (e.g., 'thanks', 'u')
requests for refunds or assistance
concise, straightforward sentence structure
i am experiencing an issue with my device
i am writing to request a refund
could you please assist me
please advise on the next steps
i ordered some shoes last week
short, direct sentences
use of informal language and abbreviations (e.g., 'asap', 'need')
repeated structure of stating a problem followed by a request
concise descriptions of issues without much elaboration
concise requests for assistance
direct statements of issues
use of abbreviations and informal language
lack of detailed context or elaboration
similar sentence structures across samples
longer, more complex sentences with multiple clauses
detailed descriptions of issues
use of qualifiers like 'not sure', 'despite', 'it appears to be'
frequent use of 'i' at the beginning of sentences
specificity in describing problems and attempts to resolve them
